pr_text:
## Title: Add null pointer validation in PNF simulator UL config request handler

### Summary
Add a missing state validation check in the `phy_ul_config_req` function to prevent null pointer dereference when accessing the FAPI interface. The PNF (Physical Network Function) simulator processes uplink configuration requests from the VNF (Virtual Network Function), but previously assumed the `phy->fapi` pointer was always valid when handling these messages.
